emails.subject: Netco Sitara Access
emails.body: Netco Sitara Access Security access for the "Estate" will be the same as Production currently is. Access for "Netco" will have to be set up from scratch. Can each of you give me a list of the people that should have access to "Netco". Access is still preliminarily being set up on a West, East, Central and Texas regional basis. Included in the list should be Risk, Logistics, Trading and anyone else that you know of that you want to have access to your region.. The plan is to have a large mass set up, additional updates will be handled under eRequest, under the new application region code "Houston Netco" (This name will be changed later) Any questions or comments, please give me a call. Russ x37386

emails.subject: FW: Netco Sitara Access
emails.body: FW: Netco Sitara Access I still need a list of people who need Netco Sitara access for the East and Central Regions. Russ

emails.subject: RE: Netco Sitara Access
emails.body: RE: Netco Sitara Access Russ, I want everyone in risk to have access to all regions. Traders should only have access to their own. Thanks KK

emails.subject: RE: Netco Sitara Access
emails.body: I understand about the Risk issue, but I was interested in what people were in each function group for Netco. I have received information on each group now except Central. Russ
